ai-tinkerers-london.notes: Part of global AI Tinkerers network (99k+ builders, 214 cities) founded by Joe Heitzeberg in late 2022. London chapter led by Luke Harries (ElevenLabs). Monthly live demo meetups, no slides/pitches.

london-machine-learning-meetup.notes: Largest ML/AI community in Europe with 11,539 members. Founded Dec 2, 2011. Organizer Martin Goodson is CEO of Evolution AI. Has YouTube channel.

aicamp-london.notes: Part of global AICamp platform (founded 2019, 500k+ developers, 50+ cities). London group has 8,255 members on Meetup. 397+ past events across platform.

pydata-london.notes: 16,241 members on Meetup. Meets first Tuesday of each month. Part of NumFOCUS (501c3). 104th meetup was Feb 3, 2026. Run by 16+ volunteers.

mlops-community-london.notes: Part of global MLOps Community founded March 2020 by Demetrios Brinkmann. London chapter launched Sept 28, 2021. 4,432 members on Meetup. Slack community at mlops.community/join.

hugging-face-london.notes: 949 members on Meetup. 4.8 star rating. Most recent was Hugging Face London #4 on March 5, 2026 at Tessl AI. Also has Instagram @huggingfaceldn.

ai-security-engineers-london.notes: 1,891 members. Part of global AI Security Engineers Community (formerly DevSecCon/MyDevSecOps), sponsored by Snyk. Also on Reddit at r/AISecEng.

london-ai-native-test-automation-devops.notes: 2,790 members. Originally London Selenium Meetup, rebranded to LondonTAD. Organizer Shashi Jagtap is former Apple engineer and founder of Superagentic AI.

ai-signals.notes: 4,575 members. Founded 2016, paused during pandemic, revived 2022, rebranded to AI Signals 2025. 75+ talks since revival. Migrating from Meetup to Luma. YouTube: @ai-signals-community.

data-ai-london.notes: 6,359 members. Sponsored by Mesh-AI. Events at 100 Liverpool Street. No recruiters/vendors/sales pitches policy. Speakers from OpenAI, Nvidia, Google, Databricks.
